searchTerms: Senki Survival Saga: Isekai no Unmei wo Kaketa Mujintou Fujun Iseikouyuu

title: Moto Sekai 1-i no Sub Chara Ikusei Nikki: Hai Player, Isekai wo Kouryaku-chuu!
titleRomaji: Moto Sekai 1-i no Sub Chara Ikusei Nikki: Hai Player, Isekai wo Kouryaku-chuu!
titleNative: 元・世界1位のサブキャラ育成日記 ～廃プレイヤー、異世界を攻略中！～
synonyms: Moto Sekai Ichi'i Subchara Ikusei Nikki: Hai Player, Isekai wo Kouryakuchuu!
The Former Top 1's Sub-Character Training Diary: A Dedicated Player is Currently Conquering Another World!~
The Former World Number 1's Alt Character Training Diary
synopsis: The protagonist who was rarely ever at school during his middle school and high school days, is unemployed even as an adult. From morning till night, it was video games. For him who was ranked first worldwide, it was his life. One day, his character is suddenly hacked. The data was unrecoverable and there was nothing that could be done. Feeling great despair at having lost his rank that he had bet everything to achieve in a world that controlled his life, the protagonist attempts suicide. When he awakens, he finds himself inside the video game, no, it was a real world that resembled it. There, he notices that he has reincarnated into the the body of a sub character that he had created and bought premium benefits for long ago but had left neglected.

title: A Record of a Mortal's Journey to Immortality
titleEnglish: A Record of a Mortal's Journey to Immortality
synopsis: The village boy Han Li was born poor. To subsidize household expenses, he joins the Qixuanmen Sect. Because of his spiritual roots, he was accepted as a disciple by the mysterious Doctor Mo and started to practice "Changchun Gong" arts under his mentorship. Although his qualifications are mediocre, Han Li embarked on the dangerous road of immortal cultivation with his unyielding will and a mysterious vial picked up by accident.

title: Nami Uraraka ni, Meoto Biyori
titleNative: 波うららかに、めおと日和
synopsis: In the spring of the 11th year of the Showa era, 20-year-old Natsumi receives a marriage proposal to Takiaki Masashi, who works for the Imperial Navy. Suddenly, she is married to a Navy husband. Their (fairly) inexperienced in house matters, as well as in the affairs of men and women, begin their life as a couple in the highest degree of purity! When the sea breeze blows, I think of you. A story of a couple living in prewar Japan, spring, summer, fall, and winter, humble but gentle.

title: My Teasing Fiancée
synopsis: Miyuki-san is an elegant young lady from Kyoto. But our relationship is complicated. Why? "My, you sure are good at flattery," she says. But were those words sincere? Or just for show? Though we care for each other, we keep talking past one another—a frustrating, bittersweet love story. (Source: Comic Growl)

titleNative: 異世界チート魔術師〈マジシャン〉
synopsis: As regular high school students Taichi and Rin disappeared in a beam of light. When they came to, the two of them were already in a world of swords and magic. Finally getting away after experiencing an attack by monsters, following the suggestion of adventurers they headed on the path towards the guild. In the guild, the two of them found out that they possessed unbelievably powerful magic. Thus the regular high school students transformed into the strongest cheats.

The gap between the seriousness and cuteness will make you faint in anxiety, and this office love comedy with a difference in age begins!

title: The Fragrant Flower Blooms With Dignity
titleRomaji: Kaoru Hana wa Rin to Saku
titleEnglish: The Fragrant Flower Blooms With Dignity
synonyms: Kaoru und Rin: So nah und doch so fern
Kaoru i Rin. Rozkwitając z tobą
The Fragrant Flower Blooms With Dignity - Kaoru & Rin
synopsis: This story takes place in a particular town with two infamous schools in constant dispute: Chidori High, a boys' school predominantly attended by low-class students with damning grades, and its neighbor Kikyo Girls' High, with most of its female students coming from wealthy and prestigious families. One day, high school second-year Rintaro Tsumugi, a fierce-looking but gentle-minded student at Chidori, is helping at his family's patisserie when he encounters a female customer by the name of Kaoruko Waguri. Rintaro enjoys his time with Kaoruko, as she doesn't judge him for his appearance, but this blissful peace is quickly disturbed when Rintaro makes the discovery that Kaoruko is actually a student at Kikyo. This revelation marks the beginning of the two's strenuous tale, as they fight against the limitations placed upon them by their schools and surroundings in an attempt to find their own path! (Source: K Manga)

title: Mimi's Tales of Terror
synonyms: Las historias de fantasmas de Mimi
synopsis: University student Mimi and her boyfriend Naoto encounter one chilling mystery after another. There’s the enigmatic neighbor woman dressed in black from head to toe—but if she’s so odd, why does it seems like there are many others like her? Then, whose eyes track Mimi’s movements from the cemetery next door? And why does a bizarre red circle drawn on a basement wall change with each passing day? Nine scary stories that really happened, drawn from the famed collection of urban legends Shin Mimibukuro (New Earmuffs), and adapted into manga by horror genius Junji Ito! Chapter 1: On the Utility Pole Chapter 2: The Woman Next Door Chapter 3: Rustling in the Grass Chapter 4: Grave Placement Chapter 5: Seashore Chapter 6: Just the Two of Us Chapter 7: Scarlet Circle Chapter 8: Sign in the Field Chapter 9: Monster Prop (Source: VIZ Media)

title: Dustland
synopsis: In the Utsusemi District of Toaru City—where Suzuran All-Boys High School towers over the landscape—a young boy named Asada Hibari has moved into the Nakahara Apartments, a place better known as "The Ghost Projects." Still trapped in the shadow of his mother's death, Hibari remains unable to escape his suffocating loneliness. However, a chance meeting with Kobayashi Sanzou, a resident of the same building, begins to lead his youth toward something hotter and more irreplaceable than anything he’s ever known!! (Source: Akita Shoten, translated)

Forced to live together, this unlikely pair finds themselves caught in a tug-of-war between lies and growing feelings… (Source: Bilibili, translated)

title: Ru Hai
synopsis: Once the closest of lovers, Ji Lingyue and Lan Wu, were forced apart by their identities as human and demon. Lan Wu, the mermaid princess, chose to leave Ji Lingyue, subjecting her to countless days and nights of agony. When they reunited at a cultivation gathering, Ji Lingyue swore never to let Lan Wu leave again.

title: Renzao Tiwen 36.7℃
synopsis: Su, born in prison, has always wanted to see the "crow" from the story her mother told her. On the day she was going to be secretly executed, Gill, an artificial intelligence with a database of everything outside the prison, was thrown into prison for a test run. Su develops a special feeling for Gill, not caring whether her words are programmed or self-conscious, and not trying to tell if she has human emotions. Unable to distinguish her own human feelings... in this small cell, the lonely Su got her first doll--she met a "person" who could comfort her soul.

titleNative: 断頭台に消えた伝説の悪女、二度目の人生ではガリ勉地味眼鏡になって平穏を望む
synonyms: The Legendary Wicked Woman Wants a Peaceful Second Life as a Boring Studious Girl
synopsis: "Don’t you think it’s stupid to be so madly in love?" Princess Letitia is due to be executed by guillotine, for the terrible crimes she committed trying to win back her fiancee's love. However, just when she thought she was dead, she was returned back in time for a second chance at life. "I won’t fall in love in my new life. I’m going to live peacefully by becoming a sober, hard-working student with glasses!” But one day, her glasses slip off and Camilo, the school's superstar, sees her true face. Then, for some reason, Camilo begins to dote on her in a tidal wave of affection…!? (Source: Comic Days, translated)

title: Starting on Hard Mode: God Levels, Got Problems

titleEnglish: Starting on Hard Mode: God Levels, Got Problems
titleNative: レベルカンストから始まる、神様的異世界ライフ ~最強ステータスに転生したので好きに生きます~
synopsis: After waking to find himself reincarnated and his past-life memories erased, Merlin is looking forward to a life of ease—but his reality is anything but easy! “Blessed” with god-tier stats and divine good looks, he quickly discovers that a normal life is next to impossible for someone who's constantly mistaken for a deity. It doesn't help that being OP means he can barely lift a finger without causing mass destruction! Then there's the issue of all the girls who desperately need his help. Too overpowered and too overrun with damsels in distress—will Merlin ever get to kick back and enjoy his new life? (Source: J-Novel Club)
